emails.subject: I want my two dollars!
emails.body: I want my two dollars! Name the movie.

emails.subject: RE: I want my two dollars!
emails.body: RE: I want my two dollars! no clue. not a movie buff. To: Arnold, John

emails.subject: RE: I want my two dollars!
emails.body: loser. it's 'better off dead' with John Cusack popular when we were kids. unfortunately you were a dork and didn't play with the other kids your age, so you missed it. great line but means nothing if you haven't seen the movie. can i come collect my from you today? i owe it to the box (it's a long story, i'll tell you later.) MSA To: Allen, Margaret

emails.subject: RE: I want my two dollars!
emails.body: What money? I don't know what you're talking about To: Arnold, John

emails.subject: RE: I want my two dollars!
emails.body: ha!ha! aren't you funny. looking. To: Allen, Margaret

emails.subject: RE: I want my two dollars!
emails.body: I'll get it at lunch. To: Arnold, John

emails.subject: RE: I want my two dollars!
emails.body: Thanks! Good luck at your meetings!!! MSA To: Allen, Margaret
